pi_items.source: Task description instructs latitude 30.00° North. math.radians(30) is 0.5235987... rounded to 0.5236.
Task description instructs longitude 40.00° West. math.radians(-40) is -0.6981317... rounded to -0.6981.
Task description explicitly lists targets: 1) Sirius, 2) Canopus, 3) Polaris, 4) Jupiter.
Task description and setup_task.sh explicitly specify /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
Task description asks for 'four screenshots', and verifier.py checks 'ss_count >= 4'.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to simulate a celestial navigation exercise. I verified that the expected latitude and longitude of 30°N and 40°W correspond mathematically to 0.5236 radians and -0.6981 radians respectively. The task explicitly requires four screenshots of Sirius, Canopus, Polaris, and Jupiter, to be saved in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium and logged in /home/ga/Desktop/nav_star_log.txt.
